chief_complaint: Chest tightness with dyspnea since morning
clinical_reasoning: Patient presents with chest tightness and difficulty breathing. History of heart failure, atrial fibrillation, and type 2 diabetes. Currently on anticoagulation (warfarin). Vital signs show borderline SpO2 (94%) and mild tachycardia. Given cardiac history and acute presentation, ORANGE triage level is appropriate.
